description_long: This shotgun features a tactical, modern design with a matte black and dark olive finish, accented by metallic gold highlights on key components. The weapon has a prominent, elongated barrel with a vented rail system on top, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The stock is adjustable and robust, with a pronounced pistol grip for enhanced control and ergonomics. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, suggesting a higher capacity than traditional tube-fed shotguns. The fore-end appears to have a pump mechanism, and the overall build is compact yet sturdy, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The trigger guard is large and rounded, providing ample space for gloved fingers.
description: A modern tactical shotgun with a vented rail, adjustable stock, and gold-accented details, featuring a box magazine and pump-action fore-end.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the vented rail, gold accents, and the full length of the adjustable stock and pistol grip.
description_view_1: The front view shows the narrow profile of the barrel and rail, with the muzzle and sight alignment visible.
description_view_2: The right side view displays the magazine, trigger guard, and the detailed structure of the stock and grip.
description_view_3: The rear view focuses on the stock and grip, showing the back of the receiver and the alignment of the rail system.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a vented rail system on top
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with pistol grip
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with ample space and smooth contours
